problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
